steps.assistant_content_head:
I'll create a multi-step registration form wizard for DevSummit 2026 according to the specifications. Let me build this step by step, verifying each part.

First, I'll create the HTML structure with all 4 steps and the progress indicator.

tool_calls.name: write_file
tool_calls.content_head:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>DevSummit 2026 Registration</title>
    <style>

steps.assistant_content_head: I need to continue implementing the JavaScript functionality for the registration form. Let me complete the implementation and then verify it by rendering the page.
